docs.title: aws-eks-helm-deploy v1 — frozen
docs.text:
v1.x is not maintained

The v1.x line of this pipe was distributed via Docker Hub at yvogl/aws-eks-helm-deploy and is frozen at v1.3.0. No active maintenance is provided — no security patches, no bug fixes.

Use v2 for all new and existing deployments: https://yves-vogl.github.io/aws-eks-helm-deploy/v2/

docs.title: Migration
docs.text:
Read the Migration Guide v1 → v2: https://yves-vogl.github.io/aws-eks-helm-deploy/v2/migration/v1-to-v2/

The migration guide covers every breaking change line-by-line:

  • INJECT_BITBUCKET_METADATA default flip
  • NAMESPACE default correction
  • Image-tag pinning policy (Docker Hub :latest frozen at v1.3.0; new rolling :2 tag on GHCR)
  • Distribution change (Docker Hub → GitHub Container Registry)
  • Removed / renamed env vars
  • New v2 env vars (OIDC_ROLE_ARN, OIDC_AUDIENCE, ACTION=diff|rollback, SAFE_UPGRADE, etc.)

docs.title: v1 environment variables (reference)
docs.text:
Variable Required Description AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID yes Static AWS access key AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY yes Static AWS secret key AWS_DEFAULT_REGION yes AWS region of the EKS cluster CLUSTER_NAME yes EKS cluster name CHART yes Path to the local Helm chart RELEASE_NAME yes Helm release name NAMESPACE no Target namespace (default: default) VALUES no Path(s) to values files SET_STRING no Helm --set-string args ROLE_ARN no IAM role to assume HISTORY_MAX no Helm history-max (default: 10)

For the canonical environment-variable reference of v2, see the v2 variables reference.

docs.title: Image source (frozen)
docs.text:
# v1 (frozen — Docker Hub):
image: yvogl/aws-eks-helm-deploy:1.3.0

# v2 (current — GitHub Container Registry):
image: ghcr.io/yves-vogl/aws-eks-helm-deploy:2
